message:
fix(codegen): Handle PyBytes to []const u8 coercion in function calls

- Add special handling for array.array passed to anytype callables
  to call .tobytes() instead of passing struct pointer
- Add PyBytes unwrapping (.data) for bytes arguments in user function calls
- Add PyBytes unwrapping for method call arguments with expected type checking
- Store parameter types in local_var_types when entering method bodies
  to enable proper type inference for bytes parameters

This reduces base64 test compile errors from 31 to 28.
